questions.question: Define process in the context of operating systems, and provide an example of a process.
questions.hint: Describe the process in your own words and provide a relevant example

questions.question: What is the difference between a process and a thread in an operating system?
State the importance of process management in an operating system, and explain how it ensures efficient system resource utilization.
questions.hint: Describe the role of process management in system resource allocation and utilization
